description: Detects high coupling in PHP files via use/require/include statements. Simplified from Rust: flags all namespace_use_declaration nodes as coupling indicators. Cannot count total imports against the 15-import threshold, detect parameter overload (>=5 params), or check low-cohesion methods missing $this references.

flag.message: use declaration detected -- monitor total import count; high coupling (>=15 imports) indicates a module doing too much
